subcodes.first_line: O ye survivors of that most exalted one among the near ones, the honored 'Azízu'lláh Khán, cherished in the hearts of them that long for you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بازماندگان آن صدرالمقربین جناب عزیزالله خان در نزد مشتاقان نام آن عزیزان
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @call to action, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @Manifestation of God as educator, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
